node.data: {"iam_title":"I'm Mohammad Hosein Nemati.","iam_caption":"A computer science student and full stack developer who is mainly interested in modeling nature rules with computers","goto_blog":"Goto Blog","about":"About Me","resume":"Resume","educations":"Educations","courses":"Courses","works":"Works","projects":"Projects","books":"Books"}

nodes.rawBody:
--- index: 0 language: en image_src: /images/personal.jpg image_alt: Mohammad Hosein Nemati --- import { Container, Row, Col } from "react-grid-system"; import { Text, Figure, Button, FrameHexagon } from "@arwes/core"; import { FontAwesomeIcon } from "@fortawesome/react-fontawesome"; import { faUser, faEnvelope, faPhone } from "@fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons"; ### Who Am I I am a Full-Stack programmer and computer science student, interested in cognitive science and genetics, a true lover of learning who has always sought more experience.
I entered the field of programming in 2012, initially with the aim of implementing an audio and video messaging software, I started to learn the concepts of network and server and programming languages, the result of this goal was the ChaM project and a world of new experiences that It helped me find my career path and focus on the Backend field.
After learning and doing a few Full-Stack projects, I gradually became familiar with Serverless architecture and LowCode and NoCode technologies, as well as the concepts of cloud computing.
Because in my view programming is merely a tool to serve humanity, I try to spend less time programming with NoCode tools and instead spend more time learning basic concepts like math, logic and genetics. To. ### Contact Me Mohammad Hosein Nemati
koliberr136a1@gmail.com
+98-937-758-8105

--- index: 1 language: en image_src: /images/kharazmi_university.jpg image_alt: Kharazmi University --- ### Kharazmi University **2016 - 2020** In 2016, I entered Kharazmi University and after completing my studies in computer science in 2020, I graduated with a grade point average of 16.12 out of 20.
Over the years, the existence of two main factors has helped me to gain a deeper and better understanding of my purpose and scientific path: some courses and like-minded friends, these two factors motivate me to be interested and then try to learn the basic concepts of mathematics and logic and ....

--- index: 0 language: en image_src: /images/mandegar_alborz_highschool.jpg image_alt: Mandegar Alborz High School --- ### Mandegar Alborz High School **2012 - 2016** In 2012, I entered Alborz High School and after completing my studies in mathematics and physics in 2016, I graduated with a grade point average of 18.80 out of 20.
This was the starting point for my interest in trying to learn programming with the goal of implementing ChaM messengers, so it was a turning point in my life, and it led me to personally learn the basics of programming.

---
index: 0
language: en
image_src: /images/ccna.png
image_alt: Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA)
---

--- index: 2 language: en --- ### FullStack Developer - Mobtaker Darya Co **2019 - 2021** I worked part-time at the private company "MobtakerDarya" for 18 months as a FullStack developer.
During this period, worked as a C# programmer in the "Container Control System (CCS)" project at the request of the "Ports and Maritime Organization of the Islamic Republic of Iran" and as NodeJS and ReactJS programmer in the "Shahin System" project at the request of the "Persian Gulf Blue Sea Company".

--- index: 1 language: en --- ### Frontend Developer - Farmeal Co **2019 - 2020** I worked part-time on the "Farmeal" project for 4 months as a Frontend developer.
I worked on this project as a ReactJS programmer with the goal of implementing the graphical interface of a restaurant management system.

--- index: 0 language: en --- ### Backend Developer - TIS Co **2018 - 2020** I worked part-time at the private company "TIS" for 15 months as a Backend developer.
During this period, I worked as a NodeJS programmer in the "Managed Funds System (MFD)" project at the request of the "Ports and Maritime Organization of the Islamic Republic of Iran".
